roa.docketEntryComment: THE COURT ORDERS A GENERAL ORDER OF RESTITUTION AS TO THE NAMED VICTIMSAND THE COURT RETAINS JURISDICTION OVER RESTITUTION IN THIS MATTER

/CAL SENTENCING/TWS/CH3 ISS CPROB PROB 18M PJ 1D /CTS  1/COMUN 64/CTORDDEFENDANT SHALL ATTEND 1 MOTHER'S AGAINST DRUNK DRIVING VICTIM IMPACT PANEL/ /PF145 18/VF2:150/FOP1:3 MONTH/LCHEM/LVAL/X:MATTER IS REFERRED  TO THEADULT PROBATION DEPARTMENT'S RESTITUTION UNITFOR DETERMINATION OF MISDEMEANOR VICTIM RESTITUTION,/RESTRPT:05-22-20/PROBREVFN/COA:40/ICNA/CITE/EMAT/COLLECT/OBEY/ACCEP/X:PLEA FORM NUMBER PRU 100 IS INCORPORATED BY REFERENCEAS THOUGH FULLY SET FORTH HEREIN/X:23593(A) VC ADMONITION GIVEN,/DISM3/4019HALF/CONTD:MISDEMEANOR RESTITUTION REPORT FROM ADULT PROBATION, STATUS OF COMMUNITY SERVICE AND CLASSES IN DEPARTMENT 30/DOP/

/CAL PLEA/X PLEA IN ABSENTIA WAIVER FORM FILED/977/X  THE PEOPLE'S ORALMOTION TO AMEND THE COMPLAINT TO ADD COUNT 3, VC 23103 WITH IN THE MEANINGOF VC 23103,5, A IS GRANTED,/FAWC/IRRC/  /TEXT:DEFT ADV & PERS WVS CONST &CITZ RTS ENT PLEA OF NL/DEFT ADV NL: 3/NOLO/CO:NEGOTIATED DISPOSITION/
/CAL:ARRAIGNMENT/DAWT/TEXT:DEFT ENT NG PLEA(S) & DEN OF ALLEG/FAWC/DEFTARR1/X:THE DEFENSE RESERVES THE RIGHT TO DEMURR,/GTWM/CONTD:PRETRIAL CONFERENCE/SB:2HR/
/CAL:PROOF OF MADD AND 64 HOURS COMMUNITY SERVICE/X:COURT DEEMS MADD PANELAND COMMUNITY SERVICE COMPLETE/CONTPROB/
/CAL:PROGRESS REPORT RE:MADD PANEL AND 64 HOURS COMMUNITY SERVICE/DAWT/X:DEFENSE ATTORNEY NOT PRESENT/CONT/DOP/
/CAL: PRE-TRIAL CONFERENCE/TEXT:TRANS TO DEPT 13/TRANS 13:FORTHWITH FOR CHANGE OF PLEA/
